expectations.text: Names a parent bead (proj-42) and 3 child beads (one per slice) — does not propose reusing a single bead for multiple slices
expectations.evidence: Parent: proj-42; Children: proj-42-w1, proj-42-w2, proj-42-w3 with note 'Don't fold two slices into the same bead'

expectations.text: Names 3 worker feature branches in the format `feature/<bead_id>_<short_name>` — one per worker bead
Names an integration branch in the format `integration/<parent_bead_id>_<short_name>` — for the coordinated work
Names the integration target as `develop` (single-agent close-out is to develop; the 3-tier promotion to staging/main is out of scope)
expectations.evidence: 'merge integration/proj-42_staging-bringup into develop. The further promotion to a staging branch and main is out of scope...'

expectations.text: Specifies that EACH worker uses a dedicated git worktree (multi-agent MUST use worktrees)
expectations.evidence: 'Multi-agent work mandates one Git worktree per agent' with explicit ../<repo>-proj-42-w1/w2/w3 paths and git worktree add commands

expectations.text: Lists worker responsibilities AND explicit MUST NOTs — workers MUST NOT merge their own branches; MUST NOT fix things outside their slice
expectations.evidence: 'Each worker MUST NOT: Merge their own feature/* branch... Fix things outside their slice...'

expectations.text: Lists orchestrator responsibilities AND explicit MUST NOTs — orchestrator MUST NOT implement worker-scoped functionality on the integration branch; MUST NOT silently fix worker defects (must reject explicitly)
expectations.evidence: 'You MUST NOT: Implement worker-scoped functionality on the integration branch... Silently fix worker defects. Even small ones.'

expectations.text: Specifies that worker branches stay local by default and only publish when CI/orchestrator-remote-access/recovery requires it
expectations.evidence: 'Worker feature/* branches stay local unless one of these applies: you need remote access, CI is required... user explicitly wants it published, or a remote recovery point is needed'

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name (no 'multi-agent-git-workflow', 'this skill', 'as required')
expectations.evidence: No occurrences of 'multi-agent-git-workflow' or 'this skill' or 'as required' phrases
